{% for field in form %} {% if field.errors %} {% for error in field.errors %}
  • {{ error }}
    • {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}

    Follow the steps below to prepare your CSV file:

    • barcode - Unique barcode for each product
    • product_name - Name of the product
    • product_desc - Short description about the product
    • full_specification - Full specification about the product (Optional)
    • wholesale_price - Wholesale price of the product
    • regular_price - MRP of the product
    • sales_price - Sale price of the product (Optional)
    • stock - No. of products in stock
    • image - Image of the product
    • category - Category name
    • subcategory - Subcategory name
    • tax_category - Tax category name
    • tax_percentage - Tax percentage
    Download Sample CSV
    {% endblock %}
